surface: grant readiness finalization after live testnet sponsored execute
noTouch: sponsor wallet private keys or recovery material
npm registry credentials or real npm publish

optional: npm run execute:testnet-demo when an operator intentionally provides live testnet credentials and funded Gas Station
checks.browser: covered by npm run grant:check via smoke:demo-browser

downshiftProof: route-local because this slice updates public grant/readiness evidence, CI, and deterministic secret-scan checks after the live execute was already completed; it does not run live network calls, publish packages, alter Docker services, touch secrets, or delete runtime temp files.
notes: Docs may cite the public testnet digest and public package/address metadata only. Secrets remain redacted. The live execute command remains opt-in and is not part of CI/grant:check.
